titleStmt.title: SII 27.135: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 135. (A.R. No. 358 of 1930-31.) KANYĀNA, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 2) set up in Gubbukōṇe Gōpālakṛishṇa temple.

This is dated Śaka 1379 (current), Dhātu, Māgha śu. 5, Thursday. In the cyclic year Dhātu the tithi occurred on 1457 A.D., January 30 when the weekday was Sunday. If the year is taken to be Īśvara the given details regularly correspond to 1458, A.D., January 19 which appears to be the intended date.

It registers an agreement made between the chief residents of the village, the fifty-two members of the jagat, the twelve jananis and Vallabhadēva-arasa according to which the villagers of Kanyana alias Rājāḍi in Hārunāḍu were to pay the latter the specified amounts annually. The village was gifted to him as umbaḷi by the king on the occasion of his birthday, when Bhānappa-Voḍeya was governing Bārakūru-rājya. The king is called Prauḍha Dēvarāya in this record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrī sarasvatyai namaḥ . śrī vāsudēvāyanamaḥ . nirvvighnamastu . namastuṁga śiraścu
ṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mulastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . harērlīlāvarāhasya
daṁṣṭrādaṁḍassapātuva[ḥ .*] hēmādri kalasā yatra dhātrīcchatra śriyaṁ dadhau . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakava
ruṣa 1379 neya vartamāna dhātu saṁvatsarada māgha śu 5 gulū śrīmaṁnmahārājādhirāja rāja
paramēśvara pūrvadakṣiṇa paścima samudrādhīśvara śrīmanmahāvīra pratāpa prauḍhadēvarāya
mahārāyaru vijayanagariya sihvāsanadalu sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁdiddu sakala sā
ṁbrājyava Āḷuvalli vannāśrīśramadharṁmmaṁgaḷanu pratipālisutta taṁnni rūpadiṁ bhānappavoḍeya
ru bārakūra rājyavanu Āḷuvakāladalu Ā prahuḍa dēvarāya mahārāyaru taṁma pu
ṭṭida varddhaṁti puṁṇyakāladalu hiriya Aramaneya kāmavaṭṭada vallabha dēvagaḷige dāna
dhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṭṭa Uru hārunāḍa voḷagaṇa rājāḍiyeṁba kaṁnyanadaūru haṁneraḍu
maṁdi kōṭe taṁmiseṭṭiya Aḷiyaṁdiru nālvaru tāyamakkaḷusaha haṁneraḍumaṁdi jana
nigaḷu yibbaru horahina heggaḍeyaru Āyivattu yeraḍu maṁdi jagattu taṁmoḷu yēka vā
kyavāgi bhānappa Oḍeyara nirūpadiṁ vallabhadēva Arasarige taṁma Ura Uṁbaḷige Oḍaṁba
ṭṭu Ā vallabhadēva Arasaru kaṁnyānada Uru Oḍaṁbaṭṭu barasida śilāśāsanada krama veṁ
teṁdare Ā rājāḍiya Uru varuṣa 1 kaṁ kuḷa kāṭi ga 740 Upacāra kāṭi ga 100 U
bhayaṁ kāṭi ga 840 ṟa Oḷage Ā vallabhadēva Arasaru Uru haṁneraḍu maṁdi jananiga
ḷu yibbaru horhana heggaḍegaḷige yiḷihi baha Uḍugoṟe Uttāra kāṭi ga 80 Akṣara
dalū yeṁbhattu hoṁnanuḷiye śuddha vallabhadēva Arasarige varuṣaṁ pratitettu baha kāṭi ga 760 A
kṣaradalu yeḷunūṟa Aṟuvattu hoṁnanu Ā vallabhadēva Arasara makkaḷu pāraṁpareya
Ācaṁdrārkkastāyiyāgi yī hoṁnanu tettubaheU mattaṁ Uru varuṣaṁ pra
ti tāu harikege hāyikki maḍidukoṁḍa kāṭi ga 50 Ā Ayivattu hoṁnanū tā
ve maḍidukoṁbaru A vallabhadēvarasu taṁmma makkaḷu Aḷiyaṁdiru buddhivaṁta ma
nuṣyaru Āranuṁ ra mēle yirisidaru Āvara pādadōpādiyāgi kaṁḍu Avaru
hēḷidarītiyali varuṣaṁprati tappade hadikeyamāḍi patravakoṭṭu hoṁna nettisi koḍutta baheU Ā
hosahadikeya māḍi Okkalamēle Āppa yisi koṭṭu hoṁnanettisi koḍutta baheU Ā
robbaru Appayasida ṭhāvinalu honnu Uṁṭṭu yillayeṁdu saṁvāja
sa java māḍidare nāu jananigaḷu nuḍida hoṟisi geyadu sādhisi koḍuveU yeṁdu rājāḍi
ya Uru kōṭe taṁmmaseṭṭiya Aḷiyaṁdiru sālvaru tāyamakkaḷu saha haṁnera
ḍu maṁdi jananigaḷu yibbaru horahina heggeḍeyaru Āyivattayeraḍu maṁdi ja
gattu taṁma svarūciyaṁ Oḍaṁbaṭṭu barasida śilāśāsana yi śāsana pramāṇinalu
naḍayasi Urajananigaḷu haṁneraḍumaṁdi yibbaru horahina heggeḍegaḷu Āro
bbaru tappidare vāsudēvarige yippattu nālku hoṁna tapputettu yi barada śāsana pramā
ṇige Ayivatta yeraḍu maṁdi jagattinoḷage Ārobbaru tappidarū vāsudē
varige haṁneraḍu hoṁna tappatettu yiśāsana pramāṇige niluveveṁdu yiṁtī nilisi
ṭṭu barasida śilāśāsana yi śāsanakke Aḷupi naḍadavaru vāraṇāsiya
lu kapileya vadhisida dōṣakke hōharugubbigōṇa vāsudēva mūrttiya
kke hōharu bānpa Oḍeyara suhastada Oppa śrī triyaṁbaka Aura ja
nanigaḷu haṁneraḍu maṁdi yibbaru horahina heggeḍeyaru Ayivattayeraḍu
maṁdi jagattinavara suhastada Oppa gabbigōṇa śrī vāsudēvaru dānavālanayō
rmadhyē dānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānāsvargamavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ . svadattā
ṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harētu vasuṁdharā . śaṣṭivaruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
krimi . śubhamastu maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.135 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
